title: Qwen3-ASR MLX segmented cache service prototype
created_from: Follow-up from validated segmented-cache evaluation FUP-001

follow_ups.title: Swift App integration for segmented-cache HTTP service
follow_ups.reason: The Python service contract is validated in fake and small real-model smoke paths, but App integration needs separate supervision, config, error handling, manual paste safety validation, and rollback behavior.

follow_ups.title: Production segment boundary policy
follow_ups.reason: The prototype uses hard duration plus optional partial-text budget. Production long dictation should test silence/VAD, punctuation, backlog pressure, and natural long-speech thresholds before choosing defaults.

follow_ups.title: Segment merge, deduplication, and crash recovery UX
follow_ups.reason: The prototype uses zero-overlap concatenation and writes local audio cache metadata, but production needs overlap deduplication/alignment and a user-visible recovery path for interrupted long dictation.
